heading: Yoting vs Youngs Siding — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yoting, Western Australia and Youngs Siding, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yoting has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Youngs Siding (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yoting or Youngs Siding safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yoting has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Youngs Siding scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yoting scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Youngs Siding scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yoting or Youngs Siding?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yoting has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
